# snapcd_agent_stack_supply (Resource)

Manages an Agent Stack Supply in Snap CD. Permits modules within the Stack to select this Agent for missions.




<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_id` (String) ID of the Agent that is assigned to the Stack.
- `stack_id` (String) ID of the Stack to which the Agent is assigned.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique ID of the Agent Stack Supply.
